title: NieR: Automata Resource Pack  | ニーア オートマタ リソースパック
description: NieR:Automata-ify your world with custom item and entity textures and models
body:
>**Voluntary: Photosensitive Epilepsy Warning**
This project features flashing elements and colours that may incite an epileptic seizure for a small number of people. Play in a well-lit room. Do not play while drowsy. For more information about epilepsy, click [here](https://www.epilepsy.com/what-is-epilepsy). >**Voluntary: General Usage Warning**
This project uses designs copyrighted under a Square Enix IP and provides derived resources as governed by Fair Use Law. Re-listings of this project and any reuse of the exact distributed file are advised against except by copyright holders and known content authors.
ニーア オートマタ リソースパック [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/UjQbv7Da?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nier-automata-resource-pack) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/415374?style=flat-square&logo=curseforge&color=f86434)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/nier-automata-resource-pack) [![PlanetMinecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Planet%20Minecraft-blue.svg?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/nier-automata-resource-pack/) [![MCJF](https://img.shields.io/badge/MCJF-green.svg?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://forum.civa.jp/viewtopic.php?f=12&t=588)
## What's this? Passionately-created Minecraft interpretations of weapons, entities, and other items from NieR:Automata. Certain aspects including block textures, GUI, and sounds are modified where appropriate.
o(≧▽≦)o NieR:Automata-ify your world! o(≧▽≦)o Choose [Main] if you would like the AIO pack. This is the main project file. Choose [Lite] if you are more interested in my weapon models. Item Frame display properties are customized for pedestal display; if necessary, delete this Item Frame model replacer for more compatibility with other resource packs.
[Lite] runs on a slower and more stable update track when compared to [Main] given the former's assets come from the latter. Go [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/nier-automata-weapons/) to view listing details specific to [Lite] on PMC. ## What's new? **4.2.15**
This is a minor update that replaces the Goliath Biped's sound effects for consistency.
For more details, view changelog.txt. For support, view support.txt. For item identification, view your language's identifiers.txt. ***
Technical Details and Permissions ### Language Support English (US) – Full
日本語 (日本) – 部分的 ### Game Compatibility Minecraft game versions: 1.20.1–1.20.2 ### Requirement(s) Development Focus: [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) (as either a game loader, Forge mod, or Fabric mod with [OptiFabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric))
Alternate Fabric Implementations: [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) ### Complements [Daylight Mobs Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/daylight-mobs-reborn) (unaffiliated Fabric mod)
[Protect Mobs From Daylight](https://modrinth.com/mod/protect-mobs-from-daylight) (unaffiliated Forge/Fabric mod) ### Associated Links [Planet Minecraft - [Main]](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/nier-automata-resource-pack/)
[Planet Minecraft - [Lite]](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/nier-automata-weapons/)
[Planet Minecraft - [Language Patch]](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/nier-automata-resource-pack-1/)
[CurseForge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/nier-automata-resource-pack/)
[MCJF](https://forum.civa.jp/viewtopic.php?f=12&t=588)（日本語）
[Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/nuanulla) ***

Permissions:
If you're using this resource pack for anything public (like photos) that doesn't involve sharing the file itself, a link is enough. Just the usual stuff. Otherwise, view the included license.txt document and refer to the Header Warning. As far as end-users are concerned, you are not permitted to use these files without attribution. You are responsible for repercussions dealt by third-parties as a result of using files belonging to this project. See license.txt. Project Credits:
Godlander, Nongko, Nuanulla et al. See credits.txt
